response.justification: Bogdan has strong senior-level experience in distributed systems and geospatial data platforms, which aligns well with the domain requirements. However, his recent tech stack is heavily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with his only professional C/C++ experience being brief and a decade old, and no Rust experience. He could be a viable candidate if the team is willing to allow ramp-up time for the primary languages.
strengths: Extensive experience building and maintaining geospatial data platforms (GISCollective, Green Map).
Proven track record designing high-throughput, low-latency microservices and distributed systems.
Strong engineering practices including TDD, CI/CD, and automated testing.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with modern C++ (last used in 2015) and has no Rust experience.
No direct mention of building navigation guidance or routing-specific algorithms.
Recent roles are predominantly focused on full-stack web and Node.js/TypeScript ecosystems rather than low-level systems programming.
